input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for PermissionDelegation.

source_facts.claim: PermissionDelegation: Allows accounts to delegate some permissions to other accounts. Specification: XLS-75. Warning. This amendment was disabled in v2.6.1 due to a bug. It will be replaced by PermissionDelegationV1_1 in a future release.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
PermissionDelegation appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.5.0.
XRPSCAN currently reports support count 1 of 35 validations, threshold 28, and no enabled ledger entry for PermissionDelegation.
Known Amendments status for PermissionDelegation is obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
